title: Legacy Command Registry
body:
A library for adding command.
This does not add content, but just a dependency of other mods.
This is a mod that enables usage of the 1.12 style for registering commands.
[Examples for modders](https://github.com/fhyjs/legacy_command_registry/blob/1.21/common/src/main/java/org/eu/hanana/reimu/mc/lcr/commands/LCRTestCommand.java)
